text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
One day, while out and about with Manhattan
Cafe...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I follow Manhattan Cafe's gaze to find a claw
machine filled with Umamusume plushies.
choice_data_list: I could get you one if you want.

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
With a cute plushie like that, I won't have to
worry about it suddenly growing its hair out...

text_block_list.name: Manhattan Cafe
text_block_list.text:
Oh, nothing. Just something from the past...
Anyways, do your best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: There's no way I can fail now!
